ddls:
CREATE TABLE "apps" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each app */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the app */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the app belongs to */,
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sub-category the app belongs to */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the app */,
  "reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the app */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the app */,
  "installs" TEXT /* Number of installs for the app */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the app (e.g., game, productivity) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the app */,
  "content_rating" TEXT /* Content rating of the app (e.g., teen, everyone) */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the app icon */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the app developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Name of the app developer */,
  "released_date" TEXT /* Date the app was released */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the app was last updated */,
  "is_free" INTEGER /* Is the app free? */,
  "is_paid" INTEGER /* Is the app paid? */,
  "platforms" TEXT /* Platforms supported by the app (e.g., iOS, Android) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apps_sub_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_category_id") REFERENCES sub_categories ("sub_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apps_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., TRAVEL_AND_LOCAL, PRODUCTIVITY) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_categories" (
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-category */,
  "sub_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sub-category */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sub_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre (e.g., Travel & Local, Sports) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_genres" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the app */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the app being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes for the review */,
  "not_helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of not helpful votes for the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES apps ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the app */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_versions_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES apps ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "android_versions" (
  "android_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Android version */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the app */,
  "android_version" TEXT /* Name of the Android version */,
  "api_level" INTEGER /* API level of the Android version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("android_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_android_versions_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES apps ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ios_versions" (
  "ios_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each iOS version */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the app */,
  "ios_version" TEXT /* Name of the iOS version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ios_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ios_versions_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES apps ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "screenshots" (
  "screenshot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each screenshot */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the app */,
  "screenshot_url" TEXT /* URL of the screenshot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("screenshot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_screenshots_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES apps ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the app */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_videos_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES apps ("app_id")
)
